titles.title: What a Lovely Name the Name of Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a name above all others, Wonderful to hear, bringing hope and cheer. It's the lovely name of Jesus, Evermore the same, what a lovely name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What a lovely name, the name of Jesus, Reaching higher far, than the brightest star. Sweeter than the songs they sing in heaven, Let the world proclaim, What a lovely name!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thru His name here's wondrous power, Power to redeem, making sinners clean. By His pow'r He cleansed the leper, Opened blinded eyes, caused the dead to rise.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He'll return in clouds of glory, Saints of every race, shall behold His face. With Him enter heaven's city, Ever to proclaim, what a lovely name.
